title: Cloud Native Enterprise AI Security Control Plane

notes.title: Cloud Native Enterprise AI Security Control Plane
notes.message: Unified runtime security for Enterprise AI
notes.script:
Hook: Enterprise AI moved from text generation to tool execution with side effects.
Unified runtime security for Enterprise AI

notes.title: The Shift
notes.message: From text generation to tool execution
notes.script:
Tension: Northbound API security alone is not enough.
From text generation to tool execution

notes.title: Problem Space
notes.message: Ten risk categories — one control plane
notes.script:
Establish runtime vs operational gaps.
Ten risk categories — one control plane

notes.title: Scope
notes.message: A control plane — not a point detector
notes.script:
Set boundaries: what this is and is not.
A control plane — not a point detector

notes.title: V1.2 Focus
notes.script:
Highlight trust chain, argument contracts, explicit confirmation.
MCP / Tool-Calling Hardening

notes.title: Eight Primitives
notes.script:
XClarity One is first landing; same controls reuse everywhere.
Platform-wide, not product-local

notes.title: Control Plane First
notes.script:
Context → Signals → Policy → Decision → Trace → Gate.
One pipeline for every judgment

notes.title: Detector Does Not Decide
notes.script:
Detectors emit; decision engine chooses action.
Signals vs synthesis

notes.title: Architecture
notes.script:
Request → Detection → Fusion → Policy → Decision → Trace.
Eight core layers

notes.title: Runtime Flow
notes.script:
Identical text, different decision by tenant/role/data class.
Same path, context-aware

notes.title: Canonical Stage Enum
notes.script:
request_type deprecated; CI fails on non-enum.
One field: stage

notes.title: Action State Machine
notes.script:
Terminal, transform, human-async; require_approval is pending.
Semantics, not priority

notes.title: Risk Families
notes.script:
MCP risks extend at risk_type layer.
16 families + TRANSPORT_TRUST_RISK

notes.title: MCP Boundary
notes.script:
Not a thin API wrapper; default block generic wrappers.
AI-mediated execution boundary

notes.title: Trust Chain
notes.message: User → Client → Server → Tool → API → Resource
notes.script:
Bind identity at every hop.
User → Client → Server → Tool → API → Resource

notes.title: Instruction / Data Separation
notes.script:
External content must never become executable.
Untrusted data vs trusted instructions

notes.title: Enforcement Points
notes.script:
Tool pre-exec highlighted for V1.2.
Input, RAG, Tool, Output

notes.title: Policy & Release Gate
notes.script:
Gate blocks deploys on metric regression.
DSL v0.1 + immutable snapshots

notes.title: Trace & Evidence
notes.script:
trace_id on every decision; full replay key.
Sync commit + async enrichment

notes.title: Implementation Roadmap
notes.script:
Start P0 vertical slice; ship P1.5 for MCP first.
P0 → P1 → P1.5 → P2 → P3
